_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Planning involves leading a continual planning process in a very complex environment; planning beyond product delivery; identifying dependencies in plans across services and co-ordinate delivery; coaching other teams as the central point of expertise.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope definition, workstream structure, milestone schedule, resource plan, and risk register.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-S-009 (DG, cosine: 0.451), LS-T-006 (LS, cosine: 0.421).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.2/10 (raw 0.417). Shared vocabulary: [plans]. DDaT-only terms [across, beyond, central, co, coaching, complex] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, data, definition, develop, initiatives, maintain] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.854 (P=0.849, R=0.860). Balanced P/R — the 34-word DDaT element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (87.1%). "Planning involves leading a continual planning process in a very complex environ" and "Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.504 > STS 0.417 (gap +0.088). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [plans] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.2%. Shared tokens: [plans]. DDaT-only: [across, beyond, central, co, coaching, complex]. WIDAI-only: [ai, data, definition, develop, initiatives, maintain].
